{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201217159DA645915281B8BC7188"}"},"total":80},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613427290114753304","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，不论是魅魔政哥还是三国白月光那年那兔那[哭][哭][哭][哭][哭]些事，没有毒点，没有忽然暧昧戏码没有拉郎配[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]强烈推荐[爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][爱心][书架加一]","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":15,"text":"白月光","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773980235B8BC7188%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227613427290114753304%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227603885994881846296%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E6%9C%88%E5%85%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772641832,"group_id":"7603885994881846296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢小甜文的大白也喜欢无限不挑食的好白白","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwCv0HJrkndGPQ+JjfkO38iE09humlObcuctMhkEFsP1","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0d93d735f5594ddcb85bfcb3dfe0bb28~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532827&x-signature=Uniq%2FVfKMRSq1YkZke%2FymNPR0pM%3D","user_id":"3558493098879159","user_name":"随风飘漂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3558493098879159","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":147,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774257512,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":26,"name":"诸神愚戏","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/5577169f8045e3cc1b4dad73f4758897~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p3-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/2757c689d84d771889d9f3037f12b7ed~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603885994881846296","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出，不要在意，会涨的！】
穿越到一个科技高度发达却历史断层的冰冷世界，苏辰参加游戏设计大赛，题目竟是“魅魔”？
当对手都在设计黑丝御姐、财阀千金时，
苏辰反手掏出了男人的浪漫——【大秦·祖龙】！ 千军万马的嘶吼，黑龙旗下的俯视。
“朕统六国，天下归一！”
那一刻，从未见过“信仰”的全网玩家泪崩下跪： “让你设计魅魔，谁让你复活千古一帝的？！”
随后，【霍去病·封狼居胥】、【朱棣·天子守国门】【李世民·玄武门对掏】、【受命于天，既寿永昌】、【赤色梦想·追随终极信仰】相继问世。
